ops.body: Post-fix adversarial verification (codex refuter, 90b74f07d2cf): all 6 findings KILLED with reproductions; 228 tests green; F6 mutation-tested; containment generalized (pre-existing ancestor symlinks, two-hop chains, --force bypass all rejected; ASCII-only CODE_ROOT_RE rules out unicode). Two residuals CONSCIOUSLY ACCEPTED, not fixed: (1) TOCTOU between verify_plan_paths resolve() and apply_plan write — needs concurrent local write access to target mid-run, out of scope for a single-user CLI threat model; (2) select_files collision check covers secondary-vs-* only, but verify_plan_paths backstops primary-vs-primary case collisions in phase 5 — no escape, two checks in different phases by design. Note: codex content-moderation flags adversarial-security-framed prompts (matches memory ccx-approvers-security-fixes); refuter used QA-framing + direct empirical repro.
